headline: 3 Reasons to Sell FTV and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Fortive has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 7.9%. Its stock price has climbed to $60.25, representing a healthy 15.8% increase. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
